name: Cream Sauce (Lc)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon arrowroot (1/4 - 1/2 tsp depending on desired thickness)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling water. Alternatively, use a non-stick pan on direct low heat.
2. Add egg yolks one at a time, beating with a whisk after each addition.
3. Gradually add 1/4 cup water and heavy cream. Continue to whisk until the sauce begins to thicken, approximately 7-10 minutes.
4. If a thicker sauce is desired, mix arrowroot with additional 1 tablespoon of water and stir into the sauce. The added carbohydrates are minimal, but the texture will be slightly thicker.
5. Sprinkle nutmeg over the sauce for garnish if desired.
6. Tip: Use only real butter to achieve the thickest consistency of sauce.
